label: Cross-attention & co-attention

node.label: Cross-attention & co-attention
node.definition: Queries from one stream attend to keys and values from another stream or memory source.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Cross-attention & co-attention is modeled as depending on Self-attention, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data and feeding downstream nodes such as Encoder–decoder transformers, Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models, Multimodal foundation models.
examples: atlas downstream link to Encoder–decoder transformers
atlas downstream link to Vision Transformers & Perceiver-style latent models
atlas downstream link to Multimodal foundation models
limitations: Its benefit depends on implementation, scale, data, and hardware; the same mechanism can add complexity without improving the target workload. Its direct dependencies include Self-attention, Multimodal, simulated & streaming data.

dependencies.rationale: Cross-attention & co-attention is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Self-attention.

In this atlas graph, Cross-attention & co-attention has a `uses` dependency on Multimodal, simulated & streaming data because Multimodal, simulated & streaming data is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
